---
title: "maggiemoss96"
image: kona.png
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maggiejmoss/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/maggiemoss96
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:maggie.moss@colostate.edu
---

Education

Experience

```{r}
1 + 1
```
